items.content:
About This Role

We are hiring a Customer Support Specialist to join our Dublin team and serve as the front line of our customer experience. You will help customers resolve technical issues, answer product questions, and ensure they get the most out of our platform.

This role is a great starting point for someone who wants to build a career in customer success, product, or technical support at a technology company. We provide thorough training and ongoing development opportunities.

Responsibilities

  • Respond to customer inquiries via email, chat, and phone in a timely and professional manner
  • Troubleshoot technical issues by reproducing problems, consulting documentation, and escalating when necessary
  • Maintain and update our help center articles and internal knowledge base
  • Track and categorize support tickets to identify trends and recurring issues
  • Collaborate with engineering to report bugs and advocate for customer-facing fixes
  • Participate in onboarding sessions to help new customers get started

Requirements

  • 1+ years of experience in customer support, helpdesk, or a client-facing role
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
  • Comfort with technology and ability to quickly learn new software tools
  • Strong empathy and patience when working with frustrated customers
  • Ability to manage multiple conversations and prioritize effectively

Nice to Have

  • Experience with support tools like Zendesk, Intercom, or Freshdesk
  • Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, or web technologies
  • Additional European language skills (French, German, Spanish)
